title: Comment Record
description: Authoritative schema for structured agency comments resolved by SYS-001.

comment_id.description: Stable identifier from the source spreadsheet.

revision.description: Revision label from the input spreadsheet. Blank inputs in single-PDF runs map to rev1.

suggested_text.description: Commenter-proposed redline or replacement language, if provided.

line_number.description: Line number within the working paper if available.

section_reference.description: Section identifier or anchor within the working paper.

source_document.description: Name of the uploaded working paper PDF that contains the comment.

source_location.description: Page, paragraph, or anchor describing the source location.

source_revision.description: Revision of the working paper that originally contained the comment.

resolved_against_revision.description: Revision of the working paper the resolution is drafted against.

validation_notes.description: Freeform notes from validation or review.

confidence_score.description: Model- or rules-derived confidence for the disposition.

provenance.description: Provenance record capturing lineage and workflow context.
